scenarios.description: appendChild(null) throws IllegalArgumentException for null child parameter
appendChild(child) on fresh element initializes childNodes and appends one child
scenarios.precondition: element created has no prior children
scenarios.expectedResult: return this element; element.childNodeSize() == 1; child.parent() == element; child.siblingIndex == 0
pseudocode: Element el = new Element("div"); Node child = new Element("span");
assert returned == el; assert el.childNodeSize() == 1; assert child.parent() == el; assert child.siblingIndex() == 0;

scenarios.description: appendChild(child) on element with existing children appends second child without reinitializing childNodes
scenarios.precondition: element already has one child added
scenarios.expectedResult: return this element; element.childNodeSize() == 2; secondChild.parent() == element; secondChild.siblingIndex == 1
pseudocode: Element el = new Element("div"); Node first = new Element("p"); el.appendChild(first); Node second = new Element("span");
assert returned == el; assert el.childNodeSize() == 2; assert second.parent() == el; assert second.siblingIndex() == 1;
